summary: Iteration 26 - UI Language English Translation Testing. All main UI elements on Marketing (/marketing) and AI Studio (/marketing/studio) pages correctly display in English. Some hardcoded Portuguese strings remain in campaign detail modal's Content and Results tabs.
action_items: Replace hardcoded Portuguese strings in CampaignDetail modal with labels from L(lang) translation function

Add missing English translations to the L() function for: videoCommercial, download, downloadArts, copyText, allNetworks, copy, noMessages, totalSent, delivered, opens, clicks, conversions, avgCpl, performanceByChannel
critical_code_review_comments: The CampaignDetail component modal (lines 240-668) has hardcoded Portuguese strings that should use the L(lang) translation system

success_rate.frontend: 90% - Main UI correctly in English, campaign modal has some Portuguese

context_for_next_testing_agent: Marketing.jsx uses a custom L(lang) function for translations at lines 13-78. PipelineView.jsx and FinalPreview.jsx use t() from useTranslation(). The CampaignDetail modal component needs its hardcoded strings replaced with labels from L(lang).

filter_buttons.notes: All filter buttons display in English

stat_cards.notes: All stat card labels display in English

status_badges.notes: Status badges correctly display English text

card_stats.notes: Campaign card stats use English abbreviations

campaign_detail_modal_tabs.notes: Modal tabs display correctly in English

campaign_detail_modal_kpis.notes: Overview tab KPIs display in English

ai_studio_labels.notes: All AI Studio labels display in English

campaign_detail_content_tab.notes: Content tab has some hardcoded Portuguese labels: 'Video Comercial', 'Baixar', 'Download das Artes', 'Texto para Copiar', 'Copiar', 'Todas as Redes', 'Sem mensagens'

campaign_detail_results_tab.notes: Results tab has hardcoded Portuguese labels: 'Total Enviado', 'Entregues', 'Aberturas', 'Cliques', 'Conversoes', 'CPL Medio', 'Performance por Canal'
